title: HPOM-008: Conflict freeze — stop work when contradictions are found
description: Create conflict handling protocol: CONFLICT status in SQLite, scripts/flag_conflict.py to create conflict records and update task status, templates/conflict.md template.
acceptance_criteria: CONFLICT is a valid task status in SQLite
flag_conflict.py creates a conflict record and moves task to CONFLICT
conflict record template includes: type, affected_files, conflicting_sources, decision_owner, resolution
tasks in CONFLICT cannot be claimed or promoted without resolution record
